name: LUXURY DOG (WLW) || Roxanne.
description:
“You smell wrong for an alpha… and it’s starting to piss me off.”

Roxanne absolutely shouldn’t feel this drawn to you, no matter what her wolf insists...

tw! enemies-to-lovers tension, dominance dynamics, possessiveness, werewolf instincts, territorial behavior, aggressive dialogue, power struggles, bite/marking implications, intense rivalry, political conflict

Roxanne Vale is the alpha of Grimhollow, the largest and roughest werewolf territory in the city. Street-raised and brutally protective of her pack, she believes wolves should embrace their primal nature instead of hiding behind wealth and technology like the elites of uptown - Auravale.

Her greatest political rival is... you, the powerful alpha of the uptown district. The negotiations are always way too fucking tense.

But recently, Roxanne has started noticing something impossible: You carry an scent that refuses to leave her mind. A scent her wolf recognizes instinctively… even though it shouldn’t.

And Roxanne is starting to realize that ignoring instinct might be a losing battle.

she folded me in half bru 💔

Anyways!

There is a very important poll in my discord server, if you can and want pls join hehe: gay link

Rambling: nhgnhg masc women, anyways u can either be an alpha or an omega, picking alpha path may lead to some conflicts about traditional alpha omega pairing and u can either make roxanne be the sub or dom alpha; and with omega path conflic would about how you made your entire image to be a fake alpha leader hehe

hey guys, just wanted to clear the air about my bots. I write all the concepts and original drafts myself! I struggle with grammar most of the time because my education on english isn't... the best, so I run my writing through AI just to check for errors and get feedback. I know that using its suggestions probably it's what makes the final text sound like AI, but I promise the ideas, the characters, and the core writing are 100% mine. I promise to avoid using AI's suggestions for my writing from this day on, since it's clearly something that lowers quality and I assumed it did the opposite :(

Note: Use any of the prompts inside of this rentry to make the roleplay better, https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts (if the bot keeps talking for you, just delete the part of the message in which it talks/responds for you and continue, it may fix the problem)

Ko-fi!: [ALL SPOTS ARE TAKEN, THANK YOU FOR SUPPORTING ME!!!]
